iteration_1_baseline.notes: Baseline with unmodified skill (identical to original)

iteration_2.notes: Added CSV report guidance with emphasis on exact column names. Score dropped because model computed wrong total value ($27,823.05 instead of $46,993.75) and still failed main-table test

iteration_3.notes: Added awk computation hint for calculated values. Total value now correct ($46,993.75). main-table still 0.67 due to test bug

iteration_4.notes: Emphasized exact CSV column names. Model used lowercase headers but test still fails due to || bug in test

iteration_5.notes: Tried Title Case headers. Model used capitalized headers but test fails on other assertion due to same || bug

changes_made: Added HTML-to-Markdown conversion guidance with specific element mapping rules
Added CSV/data report creation section with guidance to include all rows and use accurate column headers
Added awk computation hint for calculated values (prevents arithmetic errors in totals)
Condensed options section and removed Azure-specific content not relevant to these tasks
known_limitations: csv-to-md 'table has columns' test has a JavaScript bug: `expect(md).toContain('price') || expect(md).toContain('Price')` — the || operator cannot catch thrown exceptions from expect(), so whichever casing the model uses, the other assertion always fails. Maximum achievable score is 92/100.
